scripts.check: npm run check --workspace=pi-extension-opencode-cloudflare && npm run check --workspace=pi-herdr-orchestrator-extension && npm run check --workspace=pi-model-families-extension && npm run check --workspace=pi-save-md-extension && npm run check --workspace=pi-web-tools-extension
scripts.pack:pi-packages: mkdir -p out && npm run check --workspace=pi-model-families-extension && npm run check --workspace=pi-herdr-orchestrator-extension && npm pack --workspace=pi-model-families --pack-destination ./out && npm pack --workspace=pi-herdr-agents --pack-destination ./out
scripts.publish:pi-model-families: npm run check --workspace=pi-model-families-extension && npm publish --workspace=pi-model-families --access public
scripts.publish:pi-herdr-agents: npm run check --workspace=pi-herdr-orchestrator-extension && npm publish --workspace=pi-herdr-agents --access public
scripts.publish:pi-packages: npm run publish:pi-model-families && npm run publish:pi-herdr-agents
